## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in at least one Chromium and one Firefox-based browser
- [ ] Tested both `EN` and `ES`
- [ ] No new external runtime dependencies
- [ ] No build step introduced
- [ ] No telemetry / analytics added
- [ ] If user-facing text was added, both `I18N.en` and `I18N.es` are updated
- [ ] If a preset was added, both `en` and `es` blocks exist
